text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Air Groove's debut. Mejiro Dober
gives her words of encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Dober's words ringing in her ears, Air
Groove heads to her debut race determined to
live up to the younger student's expectations.
